_comment: Clean Grocery Bot — Dietary Preference Config
_instructions: Edit this file to match your preferences. This file is loaded at runtime and passed to the AI prompt. No code changes needed.

cleanliness_criteria._comment: Ordered list of criteria used to rank products. Higher priority items are weighted more heavily. Add, remove, or reorder to match your definition of clean.

priorities.label: No artificial additives or preservatives
priorities.description: Exclude products containing artificial preservatives (e.g. BHA, BHT, TBHQ, sodium benzoate) or artificial colors (e.g. Red 40, Yellow 5, Blue 1)

priorities.label: No seed oils
priorities.description: Exclude products containing canola oil, soybean oil, sunflower oil, safflower oil, corn oil, cottonseed oil, or grapeseed oil

priorities.label: Organic preferred
priorities.description: Prefer certified organic products over conventional when available

priorities.label: Avoid ultra-processed foods
priorities.description: Prefer products with short, recognizable ingredient lists. Penalize products with more than 10 ingredients or with many unrecognizable chemical names

dietary_restrictions._comment: Hard filters — products containing any of these will be excluded from results entirely, regardless of cleanliness score. Add items to the list as needed (e.g. 'gluten', 'dairy', 'nuts', 'soy', 'shellfish').

market._comment: Controls which country's products are returned by Open Food Facts. Use ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes (e.g. 'US', 'GB', 'CA', 'AU', 'FR'). This filters results to products sold in that country, improving relevance.

recommendations._comment: Default number of recommendations returned when the user does not specify a quantity. max_prefetch is the number of products fetched from Open Food Facts before pre-filtering — a larger number improves coverage but slightly increases Lambda execution time.

whole_food_fallback._comment: When enabled, the bot suggests a whole-food alternative if no sufficiently clean packaged product is found.

response._comment: Controls how the bot formats its replies.
response._format_options: short (name + one line) | medium (name + 2-3 bullets) | detailed (full ingredient breakdown)
